Richmond Village Directory Village Blueprint
Volunteer News Donate

Build your own
tiny village.

A step-by-step resource for schools, NGOs, and grassroots groups who want to build tiny house villages with and for unhoused people in their own community.

Open the blueprint

What's in it

  • Village planning in the classroom
  • Navigating district and county policy
  • Building momentum through media
  • Community outreach strategies
  • Templates and practical guides

Who it's for

Developed in partnership with Latitude High School, this blueprint is designed for anyone who wants to move from inspiration to action — whether you're a teacher, a community organizer, a faith group, or just someone who wants to do something.

Open the blueprint Get in touch with us
